title: aesandra butyracea var. andamanensis
intro: Aesandra butyracea var. andamanensis, also known as the Andaman Aesandra or Andaman Mountain Aesandra, is a plant species belonging to the Aesandra genus, commonly found in the Andaman Islands. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Aesandra butyracea var. andamanensis include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and skin care. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve its leaves and roots being used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
